problem_statement: Idea: add cross-app tracking to improve personalization and re-targeting. Need to move fast.

tickets_raw.title: Implement user-level tracking across checkout + marketing

customer_notes_raw.text: Enterprise customer wants better targeting and attribution dashboards.

documents_raw.title: Privacy note
documents_raw.text: EU GDPR implications likely. Consent + data minimization required.

proposal_details.summary: Add new tracking, build attribution, personalize offers.
